programme.title: S3E1 Animals
programme.desc: GoPro Animals delivers heartwarming, hilarious, and jaw-dropping moments from the animal world. From Golden Retrievers, French Bulldogs, and Border Collies bringing endless puppy smiles, to rescuing orcas and swimming with humpback whales, this show has it all. Wildlife photographer Chris Barnard captures the wild up close, even surviving a giraffe’s mighty kick. Plus, join Ocean Conservation Namibia as they race to save seals trapped in deadly ocean debris. A must-watch for every animal lover.

programme.title: S1E1 Bike
programme.desc: GoPro Bike delivers nonstop action with the world’s top riders. Watch Rachel Atherton, downhill champion, tear through Arrowhead, CA, Aaron Gwin, gravity master, and Steve Storey, trail innovator, dominate Trail Boik Time. Join Remy Metailler, freestyle phenom, in Puerto Vallarta, Mexico, and see Gee Atherton, enduro legend, and Dan Atherton, mountain bike pioneer, push speed, skill, and style to the max.

programme.title: S1E2 Bike
programme.desc: GoPro Bike takes you inside the world of pro cycling and mountain biking. Follow Peter Sagan, multi-time World Champion, as his story unfolds, watch Loic Bruni, downhill superstar, conquer thrilling courses, and join Geoff Gulevich, trail master, as he charges through British Columbia’s most scenic and technical singletrack in an all-out Trail Party. Adventure, speed, and skill collide in every ride.

programme.title: S1E3 Bike
programme.desc: GoPro Bike takes you on the world’s most thrilling rides. Watch GoPro athletes Sam Pilgrim, urban downhill master, and Nicholi Rogatkin, freestyle powerhouse, tackle the Downhill Challenge Medellín, the longest urban downhill race, with #HyperSmooth. Then join Gee, Rachel, and Dan Atherton, enduro and downhill champions, as they ride together through heart-pounding terrain. Speed, skill, and adrenaline collide in every unforgettable moment.

programme.title: S2E1 Bike
programme.desc: GoPro Bike brings you the world’s most thrilling rides. Watch Sam Reynolds, street shredder, Clemens Kaudela, slopestyle champion, Theo Erlangsen, trail innovator, and Vincent Tupin, downhill powerhouse, in an exhilarating GoPro Course Preview in South Africa. Then head to Zion, Utah for Red Bull Rampage with Jaxson Riddle, big-air phenom, Reed Boggs, freeride master, Thomas Genon, slopestyle superstar, and Tom Van Steenbergen, trail blazing pro, as they push the limits of skill and courage on some of the planet’s most extreme terrain.

programme.title: Extinction Soup
programme.desc: Extinction Soup is a documentary about the ground-breaking efforts to stop the international trade of shark fins. The story follows filmmaker Philip Waller on his quest to document the efforts of conservationist Stefanie Brendl, founder of Shark Allies, as she fights to educate lawmakers and helps pass legislation that will ban the trade of fins and the consumption of shark fin soup - the driving force behind the slaughter of millions of sharks every year.

programme.title: Liquid Edge Minisodes - Canyoning, Jet Ski Free Ride, and Feeding Stingrays
programme.desc: The Deap Canyoning Team defies logic as they leap from high cliffs into deep canyon pools. This realatively new extreme sport called Canyoning, is breathtaking and spectacular viewing!

programme.title: Xplash Ep107
programme.desc: Xplash brings you spectacular water-related action from around the globe. Today we'll catch some big-air freestyle kitesurfing in the Canary Islands, bodysurf giant waves in Ireland, go whitewater kayaking in Iceland and check out Hydro Flight at the Poseidon Games in Australia.

programme.title: Shark Dive TV Ep109: Whale Sharks, Feeding Frenzies, and Great White Sharks.
programme.desc: Shark Dive TV studies Whale Sharks kept in a giant tank and then takes a Deeper Dive by explaining shark hearing, shark feeding frenzies and Great White Sharks.

programme.title: Liquid Edge Ep107
programme.desc: Liquid Edge highlights the kiteboarding doc With A Kite; profiles one of surfing’s greatest legends, Tom Carroll; checks out the O’Neill Coldwater Classic in Canada; and unveils Sligo, Ireland…an extreme surf sweet spot. Also featured is female big wave surfer, Maya Gabriel; an inside look at Pipeline from The Essence of Surfing; and wakeboarding innovator Dean Lavelle gives us his view on wakeboarding today.

programme.title: Farm Hero
programme.desc: Laura is back with Will Harris and family on their legendary farm. This week, we take a step further to unraveling the philosophies that make Will one of the true innovators of our time. Laura also gets to see how the “Poorest town in America” has been impacted for the better due to Whit Oak Pastures and their commitment to the community they serve. Later, Laura and Will get gussied up to attend a gala that recognizes Will for his dedication.

programme.title: Like a Train
programme.desc: In Like a Train, the award-winning documentary that began as a student film project, you will follow the Clearwater Knights, a high school football team determined to have a perfect, undefeated season and to have fun doing it. With a coaching prodigy, not even twenty-five years old, at the helm, leading the team alongside his best friend, the Knights are a unique blend of humor, tenacity and heart. Their story will excite you, move you and make you think about things you didn’t expect out of a sports documentary. Its original score, also composed and performed by the students, will have you tapping your feet as you root for the Knights. Like a Train isn’t just about football, it’s about life, love and people.

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: Coach Jesse heads to Little Rock Arkansas, home of the famous Pulaski Academy and super-star high school football coach, Coach Kelly. The player? Joe Himon. With NFL speed and skills already, a heart of gold and courage to match, Joe has yet to commit and be recognized as the top rated recruit he should be. Find out what advice and help Coach Jesse has for Joe in this episode of Country Ball.

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: Meet Ryan Nolan, a hardworking, talented play-maker with integrity and intelligence to match. Unfortunately, at only 5’ 9”, his size has kept him off of many coaches' radar. Find out what strategies Coach Jesse has for Ryan to help him get scholarship offers and follow them on their shooting adventure as they compete to see who’s the fastest shot in this episode of Country Ball.

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: Richard Myers is a jack-of-all-trades on the offensive line with an incredibly strong work ethic. He’s already college football material. The problem? He lives in the middle of a small town in Indiana and needs help getting recruited. Come and see Coach Jesse and Richard bond over fishing and a good old-fashioned Indiana demolition derby as they discuss how to work towards Richard’s future and dreams for his football career.

programme.title: S3E1 Animals
programme.desc: GoPro Animals delivers heartwarming, hilarious, and jaw-dropping moments from the animal world. From Golden Retrievers, French Bulldogs, and Border Collies bringing endless puppy smiles, to rescuing orcas and swimming with humpback whales, this show has it all. Wildlife photographer Chris Barnard captures the wild up close, even surviving a giraffe’s mighty kick. Plus, join Ocean Conservation Namibia as they race to save seals trapped in deadly ocean debris. A must-watch for every animal lover.

programme.title: S1E1 Bike
programme.desc: GoPro Bike delivers nonstop action with the world’s top riders. Watch Rachel Atherton, downhill champion, tear through Arrowhead, CA, Aaron Gwin, gravity master, and Steve Storey, trail innovator, dominate Trail Boik Time. Join Remy Metailler, freestyle phenom, in Puerto Vallarta, Mexico, and see Gee Atherton, enduro legend, and Dan Atherton, mountain bike pioneer, push speed, skill, and style to the max.

programme.title: S1E2 Bike
programme.desc: GoPro Bike takes you inside the world of pro cycling and mountain biking. Follow Peter Sagan, multi-time World Champion, as his story unfolds, watch Loic Bruni, downhill superstar, conquer thrilling courses, and join Geoff Gulevich, trail master, as he charges through British Columbia’s most scenic and technical singletrack in an all-out Trail Party. Adventure, speed, and skill collide in every ride.

programme.title: S1E3 Bike
programme.desc: GoPro Bike takes you on the world’s most thrilling rides. Watch GoPro athletes Sam Pilgrim, urban downhill master, and Nicholi Rogatkin, freestyle powerhouse, tackle the Downhill Challenge Medellín, the longest urban downhill race, with #HyperSmooth. Then join Gee, Rachel, and Dan Atherton, enduro and downhill champions, as they ride together through heart-pounding terrain. Speed, skill, and adrenaline collide in every unforgettable moment.

programme.title: S2E1 Bike
programme.desc: GoPro Bike brings you the world’s most thrilling rides. Watch Sam Reynolds, street shredder, Clemens Kaudela, slopestyle champion, Theo Erlangsen, trail innovator, and Vincent Tupin, downhill powerhouse, in an exhilarating GoPro Course Preview in South Africa. Then head to Zion, Utah for Red Bull Rampage with Jaxson Riddle, big-air phenom, Reed Boggs, freeride master, Thomas Genon, slopestyle superstar, and Tom Van Steenbergen, trail blazing pro, as they push the limits of skill and courage on some of the planet’s most extreme terrain.

Every heat in Huntington counts. With thousands packing the sand and more looking on from the iconic Huntington Beach pier, it's one of the most electric vibes on the Challenger Series and World Longboard Tours, and the energy jumps off the screen. Watching live = the next best thing to being there.

programme.title: What's in the Barn
programme.desc: Matt is out for revenge. Last year Dale beat him badly at the Annual Vintage bike race in Barber, Alabama. But this year there is a whole new tale to tell. With just days until the race - Dale is secretly struggling to get the bike he beat Matt with last year up and working. Matt struggles just to locate a 100-year old bike. Matt's prayers are answered thanks to an old Catholic Priest he located who has possession of a bike. The priest might let Matt have the bike to race - but there are conditions. The toughest one: Don't tell Dale you have it. Can Matt afford to buy the bike and get it running in time for the race without Dale seeing it? Will Dale even get his broken bike started? And if they ever get to race, will Matt exact his revenge?
